name: Bratwurst (Sausage Making)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the casings.
2. Grind the pork through a fine blade of the grinder.
3. Grind the veal through a fine blade of the grinder.
4. Grind the pork fat through a fine blade of the grinder.
5. Mix the ground meats in a bowl.
6. Add the remaining ingredients to the meat mixture and mix thoroughly.
7. Stuff the mixture into the casings using a stuffing machine or by hand.
8. Twist off the sausage links into four- or five-inch lengths.
9. Refrigerate for up to two days. The bratwurst can be pan fried or grilled over charcoal.
